name: Identity & Trust
description: Control your identity and decide who to trust, without relying on a central authority

name: Communication
description: Tools for messaging, calls, and group chat without centralized control

name: Group Formation & Governance
description: Organize groups and make decisions together using transparent, shared rules

name: Relationship Development
description: Deepen connections and repair trust through intentional relational practices

name: Co-Creation & Knowledge
description: Build knowledge and create together using shared tools and collective intelligence

name: Events & Coordination
description: Plan events and coordinate projects across groups without a central organizer

name: Mutual Aid & Exchange
description: Share resources, skills, and support within your community

name: Learning & Development
description: Grow your skills and capacities through peer learning and open education tools

name: Platform Evolution & Sovereignty
description: Ensure the technology itself remains trustworthy, open, and community-governed

name: Place-Based Mapping
description: Make shared geography visible and connect people to place-based resources
